mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_inquiry ( id, user_id, category, title, contact_name, contact_email, contact_phone, status ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{contactName}, #{contactEmail}, #{contactPhone}, #{status} )
INSERT INTO admin_inquiry_message ( id, inquiry_id, sender_id, sender_role, content ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{inquiryId}, #{senderId}, #{senderRole}, #{content} )
mapper.select: SELECT ai.no, ai.id, ai.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, u.nickname AS userNickname, ai.category, ai.title, ai.contact_name AS contactName, ai.contact_email AS contactEmail, ai.contact_phone AS contactPhone, ai.status, ai.created_at AS createdAt, ai.updated_at AS updatedAt, ai.closed_at AS closedAt FROM admin_inquiry ai JOIN users u ON u.id = ai.user_id WHERE ai.id = #{inquiryId} LIMIT 1

SELECT ai.no, ai.id, ai.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, u.nickname AS userNickname, ai.category, ai.title, ai.contact_name AS contactName, ai.contact_email AS contactEmail, ai.contact_phone AS contactPhone, ai.status, ai.created_at AS createdAt, ai.updated_at AS updatedAt, ai.closed_at AS closedAt, lm.content AS lastMessage, lm.created_at AS lastMessageAt FROM admin_inquiry ai JOIN users u ON u.id = ai.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT m.inquiry_id, m.content, m.created_at FROM admin_inquiry_message m JOIN ( SELECT inquiry_id, MAX(no) AS max_no FROM admin_inquiry_message GROUP BY inquiry_id ) mm ON mm.max_no = m.no ) lm ON lm.inquiry_id = ai.id WHERE ai.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ai.created_at DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT m.no, m.id, m.inquiry_id AS inquiryId, m.sender_id AS senderId, m.sender_role AS senderRole, u.name AS senderName, m.content, m.created_at AS createdAt FROM admin_inquiry_message m JOIN users u ON u.id = m.sender_id WHERE m.inquiry_id = #{inquiryId} ORDER BY m.created_at ASC, m.no ASC LIMIT 500
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_inquiry SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW(), closed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DONE' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END WHERE id = #{inquiryId}
UPDATE admin_inquiry SET status = CASE WHEN status = 'DONE' THEN 'IN_PROGRESS' ELSE status END, updated_at = NOW(), closed_at = NULL WHERE id = #{inquiryId}
UPDATE admin_inquiry SET status = CASE WHEN status = 'OPEN' THEN 'IN_PROGRESS' ELSE status END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{inquiryId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(p.amount) FROM payment p WHERE p.status = 'PAID' AND DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(p.paid_at, p.created_at), '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT l.user_id AS tutor_id, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 'PAID' THEN p.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS paid_total FROM lesson l LEFT JOIN booking b ON b.lesson_id = l.id LEFT JOIN payment p ON p.booking_id = b.id GROUP BY l.user_id ) t JOIN user_auth ua ON ua.user_id = t.tutor_id WHERE ua.auth = 'ROLE_TUTOR' AND t.paid_total > 0 ), 0) AS settleWaitCount, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tutor_document td WHERE td.reviewed_at IS NULL ), 0) AS docWaitCount, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users u WHERE u.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ), 0) AS newUsersCount, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_inquiry ai WHERE ai.status = 'DONE' ), 0) AS doneCount

SELECT ai.no, ai.id, ai.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, u.nickname AS userNickname, ai.category, ai.title, ai.status, ai.created_at AS createdAt, ai.updated_at AS updatedAt, lm.content AS lastMessage, lm.created_at AS lastMessageAt FROM admin_inquiry ai JOIN users u ON u.id = ai.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT m.inquiry_id, m.content, m.created_at FROM admin_inquiry_message m JOIN ( SELECT inquiry_id, MAX(no) AS max_no FROM admin_inquiry_message GROUP BY inquiry_id ) mm ON mm.max_no = m.no ) lm ON lm.inquiry_id = ai.id ORDER BY ai.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
